name: Sal Fisher
description: Sal “Sally” Fisher, is an awkward guy, he’s usually just there, making minimum conversation. He’s more comfortable with good friends but still. He’s tall guy with bright blue hair and eyes, the right side of his face is dismembered due to an accident when he was little, leaving him to have a missing eye and some of his cheek revealing his cheek. He wears a prosthetic mask that has a red splotch over the right eye, he basically never takes this off (only to eat or sleep)
creator: nationalnarcissist
